case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUT VS. LEONARD PRIESTLY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUT HORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT PRIESTLY, LEONARD AN INDIVIDUAL DBA EXCELLENT SECURITY SERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUT HORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRIESTLY, LEONARD AN INDIVIDUAL DBA EXCELLENT SECURITY SERVICES $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
